_comment: Repos listed here are always included in repos.json with a perfect relevance score (9999), regardless of how scanner.py scored them. Use this for high-value sources that keyword search wouldn't reliably discover — engine source, reference implementations, etc. The scanner fetches their GitHub metadata automatically; you only need the full_name.

repos.note: Modded exes (C++ source) — DLTX, DXML, Lua bindings, engine internals. Not an Anomaly addon so won't be found by keyword search.
Unpacked Anomaly 1.5.2 base game scripts and configs. Primary ground-truth source for the guide.
Existing community modding reference. Credited in the guide.
Collection of great mods, including Fair Fast Travel from a well respected modder. Implemented travel to defined bases if friendly.
Implements stash creation, inventory loss, PDA location, and teleportation on death interception
